title: Fix: Deadlock in concurrent transactions
original_text: Fixed deadlock in concurrent database transactions. Identified circular dependency in transaction ordering. Implemented consistent lock ordering. Added transaction timeout. Implemented deadlock detection and retry logic. Result: deadlocks resolved.
expected_subject: fix(db): fix deadlock in concurrent transactions
expected_body_lines: - Identify circular dependency in transaction ordering
- Implement deadlock detection and retry logic
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(db): fix deadlock in concurrent transactions"
